PostToolUse.description: Type-check after file edits — catches crashes before they ship

PostToolUse.hook: cd /Users/camillebrown/StudioAI && npx eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern $(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -5) 2>&1 | tail -20
PostToolUse.description: Lint changed files for react-hooks/exhaustive-deps violations

PrePush.hook: cd /Users/camillebrown/StudioAI && npx tsc --noEmit && npx eslint . --max-warnings 0 && npm run build
PrePush.description: Full type-check, lint, and build before pushing — blocks push on failure
